frontend.rationale: Mature ecosystem, fast dev server, the default this app itself uses.
Less boilerplate and smaller bundles; smaller ecosystem.
React-like with fine-grained reactivity and no virtual DOM.

backend.rationale: Native desktop with a Rust core; tiny binaries, strong safety.
Ubiquitous, easy to hire for; weaker typing without extra setup.
Great for data/ML-adjacent work with typed, async endpoints.

database.rationale: Zero-ops embedded DB; perfect for local-first and single-node apps.
Battle-tested relational DB for multi-user, concurrent workloads.
No persistent store — fine for stateless tools or static sites.

deployment.rationale: Ship a signed binary/installer; no servers to run.
Reproducible container you can run anywhere; some ops overhead.
Push-to-deploy for web frontends and edge functions.

pipes.rationale: No external integrations yet — keep the surface small.
Payments and billing without building a PCI surface yourself.
A queue/worker for slow or scheduled work off the request path.
